metadata.title: Astl (MGI:MGI:3046414)
metadata.comment: deleted as all annotations were ISO annotations from a paper (PMID:15087446) that has subsequently been retracted: see Quesada V et al. Withdrawal: Identification and characterization of human and mouse ovastacin: A novel metalloproteinase similar to hatching enzymes from arthropods, birds, amphibians, and fish. J Biol Chem. 2019 Jan 25;294(4):1432. PMID:30808003
